## What's changed

- Fixed Codex Spark limits disappearing when their usage and reset values matched another Codex limit.
- Added Stable and Beta update channels, with channel changes taking effect immediately.
- Added automatic GitHub pre-release publishing for SemVer versions such as `0.4.0-beta.1`; Stable clients ignore these builds while Beta clients can receive them.

Existing installations can update normally in place; no migration or reinstall is required.

**Full changelog:** [v0.3.0...v0.3.1](https://github.com/CallMeLewis/UsageDeck/compare/v0.3.0...v0.3.1)
